changes.description: Replace simple OpenAI tool calls with HTTP route-based architecture like OpenClaw. Create routes for each action (e.g., /act, /snapshot) instead of embedding in OpenAI function tools.
changes.why: OpenClaw's server-based approach is more robust, allows better error handling, and separates concerns.

changes.description: Implement comprehensive snapshot formats: Add AI snapshots (using Playwright's _snapshotForAI), Aria snapshots, and options for interactive/compact modes.
changes.why: OpenClaw supports multiple snapshot types for different use cases, making complex UI analysis possible.

changes.description: Add sophisticated error handling with AI-friendly error rewriting (e.g., toAIFriendlyError function) that provides actionable guidance instead of raw errors.
changes.why: OpenClaw's error messages help agents recover from failures like viewport issues or missing elements.

changes.description: Implement role ref caching and persistence across sessions, similar to OpenClaw's roleRefsByTarget and storeRoleRefsForTarget.
changes.why: This prevents ref staleness and allows refs to persist across multiple actions.

changes.description: Add support for browser profiles, allowing different isolated browser instances (e.g., chrome profile for relay, openclaw profile for managed browser).
changes.why: OpenClaw supports different browser configurations for various automation needs.

changes.description: Implement proper timeout normalization and interaction timeouts (e.g., resolveInteractionTimeoutMs) to prevent hangs.
changes.why: OpenClaw clamps timeouts to reasonable ranges and handles long-running operations safely.

changes.description: Add frame/iframe support in snapshots and actions, allowing operations within nested frames.
changes.why: OpenClaw can target elements in iframes, which is essential for complex web apps.

changes.description: Implement browser lifecycle management: status, start, stop, and tab management (open, focus, close).
changes.why: OpenClaw provides full control over browser state, not just navigation.

changes.description: Add advanced wait conditions: wait for text, textGone, selector, URL, loadState, and custom functions.
changes.why: OpenClaw's wait actions handle dynamic content loading much better than simple time-based waits.

missing_functions.name: scrollIntoViewViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Scrolls an element into view by ref using Playwright's locator.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded with timeout handling. Essential for off-screen elements.
missing_functions.complex_task: Handles viewport scrolling for elements outside current view, with proper error handling for non-existent refs.

missing_functions.name: evaluateViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Executes custom JavaScript in browser context, supporting both page-level and element-specific evaluation with timeout and abort handling.
missing_functions.complex_task: Allows running arbitrary JS code for advanced automation tasks like form manipulation, data extraction, or custom interactions.

missing_functions.name: waitForViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Advanced wait function supporting multiple conditions: time, text appearance/disappearance, selector visibility, URL changes, load states, and custom JS functions.
missing_functions.complex_task: Enables waiting for complex page state changes, crucial for dynamic web applications with AJAX loading.

missing_functions.name: dragViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Drags an element from one ref to another, with timeout handling.
missing_functions.complex_task: Supports drag-and-drop interactions common in modern web apps.

missing_functions.name: selectOptionViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Selects options in dropdown elements by value array, with timeout.
missing_functions.complex_task: Handles complex select elements with multiple selections.

missing_functions.name: fillFormViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Fills multiple form fields at once based on field array, handling different input types.
missing_functions.complex_task: Automates complex form filling with proper type handling (checkboxes, radios, text).

missing_functions.name: takeScreenshotViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Takes screenshots of full page, elements, or viewport with type options.
missing_functions.complex_task: Supports visual verification and debugging of page states.

missing_functions.name: screenshotWithLabelsViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Creates labeled screenshots showing element boundaries and refs.
missing_functions.complex_task: Visual debugging tool showing interactive elements overlaid on page.

missing_functions.name: pdfViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Saves current page as PDF with print background.
missing_functions.complex_task: Document generation and archiving capabilities.

missing_functions.name: browserConsoleMessages
missing_functions.description: Retrieves browser console messages with filtering by level and targetId.
missing_functions.complex_task: Debugging tool for JavaScript errors and console output in automated sessions.

missing_functions.name: navigateViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Enhanced navigation with error handling, retry on detached frames, and URL validation.
missing_functions.complex_task: Robust navigation handling for unreliable web apps and extension relays.

missing_functions.name: snapshotAiViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Creates AI-optimized snapshots using Playwright's internal snapshot tool.
missing_functions.complex_task: Provides more intelligent element analysis for complex UI understanding.

missing_functions.name: snapshotRoleViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Creates role-based snapshots with interactive/content filtering and frame support.
missing_functions.complex_task: Advanced snapshot modes for focusing on specific element types or areas.

missing_functions.name: closePageViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Closes browser pages/tabs.
missing_functions.complex_task: Proper tab management in multi-tab automation scenarios.

missing_functions.name: resizeViewportViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Changes browser viewport size.
missing_functions.complex_task: Testing responsive designs and handling mobile/desktop layouts.

missing_functions.name: highlightViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Highlights elements for visual debugging.
missing_functions.complex_task: Visual feedback during automation development and debugging.

missing_functions.name: pressKeyViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Sends keyboard input to page.
missing_functions.complex_task: Complex keyboard interactions like shortcuts and sequences.

missing_functions.name: setInputFilesViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Sets files for file input elements with proper event dispatching.
missing_functions.complex_task: File upload automation with change event triggering.

missing_functions.name: forceDisconnectPlaywrightForTarget
missing_functions.description: Force disconnects Playwright connection to recover from stuck operations.
missing_functions.complex_task: Recovery mechanism for hanging JavaScript evaluations or timeouts.

missing_functions.name: listPagesViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Lists all open pages/tabs with metadata.
missing_functions.complex_task: Multi-tab management and monitoring.

missing_functions.name: createPageViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Creates new browser pages/tabs.
missing_functions.complex_task: Multi-tab workflow automation.

missing_functions.name: focusPageByTargetIdViaPlaywright
missing_functions.description: Focuses specific pages/tabs.
missing_functions.complex_task: Tab switching in complex multi-tab scenarios.
